property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
20:33:45.182 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.aiguestfeedbackanalyzer.AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests]: AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 20:33:45.287 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.aiguestfeedbackanalyzer.AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplication for test class com.example.aiguestfeedbackanalyzer.AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests
. ____ _ __ _ _ /\\ / ___'_ __ _ _(_)_ __ __ _ \ \ \ \ ( ( )\___ | '_ | '_| | '_ \/ _` | \ \ \ \ \\/ ___)| |_)| | | | | || (_| | ) ) ) ) ' |____| .__|_| |_|_| |_\__, | / / / / =========|_|==============|___/=/_/_/_/
:: Spring Boot :: (v3.5.6)
2026-04-28T20:33:45.742-05:00 INFO 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] .AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests : Starting AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests using Java 24.0.2 with PID 27452 (started by nynyp in C:\Users\nynyp\OneDrive\Code\AI Guest Feedback Analyzer) 2026-04-28T20:33:45.743-05:00 INFO 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] .AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests : No active profile set, falling back to 1 default profile: "default" 2026-04-28T20:33:45.744-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] o.s.boot.SpringApplication : Loading source class com.example.aiguestfeedbackanalyzer.AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplication 2026-04-28T20:33:45.775-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] o.s.w.c.s.GenericWebApplicationContext : Refreshing org.springframework.web.context.support.GenericWebApplicationContext@40bffbca 2026-04-28T20:33:46.624-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerMapping : 3 mappings in 'requestMappingHandlerMapping' 2026-04-28T20:33:46.639-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] o.s.b.a.AutoConfigurationPackages : @EnableAutoConfiguration was declared on a class in the package 'com.example.aiguestfeedbackanalyzer'. Automatic @Repository and @Entity scanning is enabled. 2026-04-28T20:33:46.691-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] o.s.w.s.handler.SimpleUrlHandlerMapping : Patterns [/webjars/**, /**] in 'resourceHandlerMapping' 2026-04-28T20:33:46.703-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] s.w.s.m.m.a.RequestMappingHandlerAdapter : ControllerAdvice beans: 0 @ModelAttribute, 0 @InitBinder, 1 RequestBodyAdvice, 1 ResponseBodyAdvice 2026-04-28T20:33:46.745-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] .m.m.a.ExceptionHandlerExceptionResolver : ControllerAdvice beans: 0 @ExceptionHandler, 1 ResponseBodyAdvice 2026-04-28T20:33:46.792-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] .s.b.a.l.ConditionEvaluationReportLogger :
============================ CONDITIONS EVALUATION REPORT ============================

2026-04-28T20:33:46.798-05:00 INFO 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] .AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests : Started AiGuestFeedbackAnalyzerApplicationTests in 1.375 seconds (process running for 2.171) 2026-04-28T20:33:46.799-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state LivenessState changed to CORRECT 2026-04-28T20:33:46.800-05:00 DEBUG 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] o.s.b.a.ApplicationAvailabilityBean : Application availability state ReadinessState changed to ACCEPTING_TRAFFIC
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\nynyp\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
